description: This video explores the growth of DeFi from $250 million in early 2019 to $250 billion by the end of 2021, highlighting key applications and the accessibility benefits for users.
topic_summary: The total value locked in DeFi increased significantly from [t=00:00] to [t=00:13]. It covers notable applications like stablecoins and decentralized exchanges [t=00:14]. The core benefit of DeFi is its accessibility to financial services for those outside traditional finance [t=00:28].
